ocr_findings.description: Mascot cat icon rendered as '🐱' emoji in cleaned OCR; image shows a drawn cat character. Cosmetic substitution, no text meaning affected.
Study tip column (朝学習) is captured in a blockquote block; image presents it as a distinct shaded sidebar. Layout difference only, all text content preserved.

reviewer_notes: Page covers ソフトウェア受入れ支援, 利用者マニュアル, and the 朝学習 study tip column. Cleaned OCR captures all substantive text accurately including the 試験にはコレが出る！ box content and the full column text. No meaningful content loss.
